Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to Zabbix. Authentication data differs from the previously collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
